sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (id Int32, event_time Int64) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
SELECT id, fromUnixTimestamp64Micro(event_time, 'UTC') AS converted FROM timestamps WHERE event_time != ANY (SELECT event_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL);

SELECT id, fromUnixTimestamp64Micro(event_time, 'America/New_York') AS converted_time, event_time != ANY (SELECT event_time FROM timestamps WHERE event_time = 1234567891011) AS is_different FROM timestamps;
CREATE TABLE events (event_id Int32, timestamp Int64, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_id;
INSERT INTO events VALUES (1, 1234567891011, 'Event A'), (2, 1234567899999, 'Event B'), (3, NULL, 'Event C');

SELECT e.event_id, fromUnixTimestamp64Micro(e.timestamp, 'UTC') AS event_time FROM events e JOIN timestamps t ON e.event_id != ANY (SELECT id FROM timestamps WHERE event_time IS NOT NULL) WHERE e.timestamp IS NOT NULL;

WITH (SELECT MAX(timestamp) FROM events) AS max_ts SELECT id, fromUnixTimestamp64Micro(event_time, 'UTC') AS converted FROM timestamps WHERE event_time != ANY (SELECT timestamp FROM events WHERE timestamp IS NOT NULL AND timestamp < max_ts);
CREATE TABLE complex_events (event_id Int32, timestamp Int64, level Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY event_id;

SELECT e.event_id, fromUnixTimestamp64Micro(e.timestamp, 'UTC') AS event_time, e.level != ANY (SELECT level FROM complex_events WHERE level IS NOT NULL) FROM complex_events e WHERE e.timestamp IS NOT NULL;
